testcase.name: titleTest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for title to contain "Lenskart1.com". Current title: "Lenskart.com® - Sunglasses, Contact Lens, Eyeglasses, Frames, Buy 1 Get 1 Offer for Gold Members" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.5.3', revision: '4b786a1e430' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '12.6.1', java.version: '17.0.4.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities se:cdpVersion: 108.0.5359.71, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: bd216ad546611a07ef8a21e613418681 at
